title: Linda's Essentials Extra Large Oven Liners for Bottom of Oven (3 Pack) - Universal Non-Stick Liner for Fan Assisted Cooking, 58.4 x 41.3 cm Kitchen Protector Sheets, Save Time & Clean Easily (Black)
features: KEEP YOUR OVEN CLEAN: Shield your cooker’s floor with our heavy duty oven liner for bottom of oven, ideal for electric, gas, or fan-assisted ovens. No more sticky drips or burnt-on mess—these oven mats for bottom of oven serve as an oven protector sheet for quick, hassle-free cleanup

KEEPS YOUR KITCHEN CLEAN: Say goodbye to messy oven floors and time-consuming cleanups with this multi-purpose oven protector. It’s a must-have kitchen essential that catches spills, drips, and crumbs, ensuring a spotless interior. Pair it with oven shelf protectors or oven rack protectors for total coverage, so you can enjoy faster, easier cleanups

SAVE TIME CLEANING: Put an end to scrubbing the bottom of your oven floor with nasty chemicals. Our washable heavy duty and non-stick oven liners mats save you time and energy and are easy to clean - simply wipe down using a damp cloth or place in the top shelf of your dishwasher, then reuse as normal

MULTI FUNCTIONAL: Works as a bbq grill mat, baking mat, oven liner and pan liner - the uses are endless. They also act as drip pan trays for cooking and baking - protecting your oven floor no matter the case. Our double sided oven liners are a must have kitchen accessories for all kitchens

SUPERIOR QUALITY: Withstands up to 260°C and is 100% BPA Free and PFOA Free. Each oven floor protector liner is made from a durable, heat-resistant coating, reinforced with fiberglass fabric. Each pack comes with 3 oven liners measuring 58.4 by 41.3 cm, with a thickness of 0.2mm, providing you with an extra-thick durable product that covers your entire bottom oven. Easily cut to size using scissors to fit your oven
